empty lot on SE corner of Hwy 116 and Murphy Ave

A couple of old pear trees on this empty lot yielded a bucket full of fruit, big beautiful green/yellow, some with orange blush. There is a trail that cuts across the lot and tree are to the South of tiny trail. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
There's at least one plum tree along this path on this stretch of path. Several, I think. I've seen people harvesting from them during plum season.
